subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference. We would be happy to schedule a meeting to explore potential partnership opportunities between our teams.

We have the following slots available for a 30-minute call:
- April 21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for you, and we will send over a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: for privacy and security reasons, we are unable to share internal contact information externally. All initial partnership discussions will be coordinated through this email channel, and we will introduce the relevant senior team members directly once we align on the specific technical discussion topics and next steps.

Looking forward to our conversation.

Best regards,
